snp5.18:1.1: That is what the Blessed One said when dwelling among the Magadhans at the Pāsāṇaka shrine.
snp5.18:1.2: Asked in turn by the sixteen brahmans, he answered their questions.
snp5.18:1.3:
And if one were to practice the Dhamma in accordance with the Dhamma,
knowing the meaning and Dhamma of each of these questions, one would go to the far shore of birth & death.
snp5.18:1.4: Because these Dhammas lead there, this Dhamma-sequence is called “To the Far Shore.”
snp5.18:4.1: They went to the Awakened One,
snp5.18:4.3: They went to the excellent Awakened One,
snp5.18:5.2: when asked their questions, answered in line with the truth.
snp5.18:5.3: By answering their questions, the sage
snp5.18:6.1: They, delighted by the One with Eyes—
snp5.18:6.4: in the presence of the one of foremost discernment.
snp5.18:7.4: would go from the near shore to the far—
snp5.18:8.1: would go from the near shore to the far
snp5.18:8.3: The path is for going beyond,
snp5.18:8.4: and so it’s called “To the Far Shore.”
